---
title: "01 Setup Libraries"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Intent: load all required packages for data ingestion, wrangling, and reporting.
# We intentionally keep this chunk messy and a little inconsistent for debugging practice.
# Students should verify package names and namespaces carefully.

library(tidyverse)
library(tidyquant)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)   # typo on purpose: should likely be lubridate

# Intent: print package versions to document environment reproducibility.
# Bug potential: one package may not have loaded due to typo above.
sessionInfo()
```

```{r}
# Intent: define a rough start/end period used by downstream files.
# These globals are intentionally simple and hardcoded for workshop use.
.start.date=Sys.Date()-years(10)
.END.date<-Sys.Date()

# Intent: show dates so students can confirm timeline assumptions.
print(.start.date)
print(.END.date)
```
